OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector.

RST_THREAT_FEED_BASEURL.description: The base URL of the RST Cloud API.

RST_THREAT_FEED_APIKEY.description: The API key for accessing the RST Cloud threat feed.

RST_THREAT_FEED_SSL_VERIFY.description: Whether to verify SSL certificates when connecting to the API.

RST_THREAT_FEED_CONTIMEOUT.description: Connection timeout in seconds for feed downloads.

RST_THREAT_FEED_READTIMEOUT.description: Read timeout in seconds for feed downloads.

RST_THREAT_FEED_RETRY.description: Number of retries for feed download attempts.

RST_THREAT_FEED_MAX_RETRIES.description: Maximum number of retries for connection issues when sending the STIX bundle to OpenCTI.

RST_THREAT_FEED_RETRY_DELAY.description: Initial delay in seconds between retries when sending the STIX bundle to OpenCTI.

RST_THREAT_FEED_RETRY_BACKOFF_MULTIPLIER.description: Multiplier applied to the retry delay for exponential backoff.

RST_THREAT_FEED_IP.description: Whether to import IP address indicators.

RST_THREAT_FEED_DOMAIN.description: Whether to import domain name indicators.

RST_THREAT_FEED_HASH.description: Whether to import file hash indicators.

RST_THREAT_FEED_LATEST.description: Time range for the feed data to retrieve.

RST_THREAT_FEED_MIN_SCORE_IMPORT.description: Minimum score threshold for importing indicators. Indicators below this score will be ignored.

RST_THREAT_FEED_MIN_SCORE_DETECTION_IP.description: Minimum score to set x_opencti_detection to true for IP indicators.

RST_THREAT_FEED_MIN_SCORE_DETECTION_DOMA.description: Minimum score to set x_opencti_detection to true for domain indicators.

RST_THREAT_FEED_MIN_SCORE_DETECTION_URL.description: Minimum score to set x_opencti_detection to true for URL indicators.

RST_THREAT_FEED_MIN_SCORE_DETECTION_HASH.description: Minimum score to set x_opencti_detection to true for hash indicators.

RST_THREAT_FEED_ONLY_NEW.description: Whether to import only new indicators (not previously seen).

RST_THREAT_FEED_ONLY_ATTRIBUTED.description: Whether to import only indicators attributed to a specific threat actor or malware.

RST_THREAT_FEED_KEEP_NAMED_VULNS.description: Whether to keep named vulnerabilities in the feed data.

RST_THREAT_FEED_CREATE_MITRE_TTPS.description: Whether to create relationships between indicators and MITRE ATT&CK TTPs. Enabling this will create a large number of relationships.

RST_THREAT_FEED_CREATE_CUSTOM_TTPS.description: Whether to create custom Attack-Pattern objects and relationships for named techniques not yet covered by MITRE.
